# CWE-325 vulnerable: Missing Cryptographic Step (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-325-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"database/sql"
	"io"
)

func EncryptFieldPayload(db *sql.DB, owner, pan string) error {
	key := []byte("0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef")
	block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	iv := make([]byte, aes.BlockSize)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, iv); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	stream := cipher.NewCTR(block, iv)
	out := make([]byte, len(pan))
	stream.XORKeyStream(out, []byte(pan))
	_, err = db.Exec("UPDATE cards SET cipher = ? WHERE owner = ?", out, owner)
	return err
}
